description: Cloudflare cache rules — cache static assets, bypass API and SSE

rules.description: Cache static frontend assets (JS, CSS, images)
Bypass cache for SSE streams (X-Accel-Buffering: no)
rules.comment: SSE endpoints must not be buffered or cached

setup_instructions: Create via Cloudflare dashboard: Caching > Cache Rules. Or via API: POST /zones/{zone_id}/rulesets (phase: http_request_cache_settings)
